lesson: Overtemp trips on a timer with no air moving and no fan noise point at the fan motor itself. If the fan is silent, cleaning the coil won’t bring it back.
symptoms: Machine trips out after running for a while.
Resets fine but trips again after 20 minutes.

tests.error-log: Refrigeration protection trips logged repeatedly — pressures and temps drifting out of range under load.
tests.temp-probe: The condenser side is running very hot, and almost no air is moving through the back of the machine.
tests.continuity-test: Condenser fan motor winding reads open-circuit.

flavour: Hot and bothered for reasons unrelated to the product.
authenticityNote: A seized condenser fan starves the system of cooling; the compressor thermal overload trips on a timer. Often misdiagnosed as low refrigerant — look at the fan before reaching for the gauges.
